name: accounting firm partners managing 10-20 clients tool
description: For accounting firm partners processing 10-20 clients, inefficient audit trails cause compliance delays. We automate compliance reporting instead of manual tracking and reporting processes.
problem_solved: Difficulty in maintaining accurate audit trails and generating timely compliance reports.
features: manual entry of audit trail data
